# Governance Continuity Plan

This planning note is not an executable workflow and does not configure repository permissions.

## Future Concepts

- Governance continuity review
- Approval continuity review
- Orchestration continuity review
- Replay and audit continuity review
- Certification continuity review
- Documentation continuity review

## Boundaries

This plan does not enable runtime communication, deployment automation, provider implementation, credential handling, workflow execution, or automatic approval.

## Planning Review Checks

- Future repository automation remains non-deployment until explicitly approved.
- Future guardrails must preserve runtime-disabled truth.
- Future governance continuity reviews must require human review.
- Future continuity checks must remain traceable to phase status.
